text: VER: Front-left is graining already, losing the front end into turn 4.
Engineer to VER: Copy, we'll look at front tyre pressures for the next run.
NOR: Car feels good on the soft, but rear is snapping on throttle out of the last corner.
LEC: Brakes are running hot, I can smell them on the long straight.
HAM: There's a lot of understeer in the high-speed section, no front grip.
Engineer to HAM: Understood, we'll add front wing for the next lap.
PIA: Long-run pace on the medium looks strong, tyres holding up well after ten laps.
VER: Rear tyres are gone after eight laps, big degradation on the hard compound.
LEC: We have traffic, the McLaren is backing me up into turn 1.
Engineer to NOR: Track is evolving, expect three tenths of grip on the final run.
NOR: Yellow flag in sector 2, I had to lift, lap is deleted.
LEC: Lap time deleted for track limits at turn 9, I ran wide.
Engineer to VER: P1 provisional, that's pole, great job.
HAM: Headwind on the straight cost me time, the rear was unstable on braking.
Engineer to VER: Good launch, you keep the lead into turn 1.
NOR: Tyres are coming alive now, I'm catching the Ferrari ahead.
LEC: Front-left graining is back, I'm struggling to hold this pace.
Engineer to LEC: Box this lap, box box, we go to the hard tyre.
Engineer to NOR: Leclerc is pitting, this is the undercut window, push now.
Engineer to NOR: Undercut worked, you came out ahead of Leclerc, P2 now.
HAM: I have DRS on Russell, I'll have a look down the inside into turn 1.
Engineer to RUS: Hamilton has DRS, hold position, do not fight your team-mate.
Engineer to VER: Switch engine mode to push, we're managing a five second gap.
VER: It's starting to rain in sector 3, light drizzle on my visor.
Engineer to PIA: Rain expected to intensify in five minutes, prepare for intermediates.
LEC: Safety car is out, there's a car stopped at turn 6.
Engineer to NOR: Safety car this lap, box for intermediates, it's the right call.
HAM: Conditions are treacherous, no grip on the slicks, I nearly lost it at turn 4.
Engineer to VER: Last lap, gap is four seconds, bring it home, you've won it.
NOR: Great result, the undercut and the safety car call won us second place today.
